defaults.customer_service: Delivers responsive, courteous support to customers and stakeholders; communicates technical information in plain language; balances competing priorities while meeting service levels and deadlines.
defaults.security: Safeguards VA information systems by adhering to cybersecurity and privacy requirements (FISMA/NIST, VA Rules of Behavior); applies least‑privilege and change control; promptly reports and remediates vulnerabilities and incidents.
defaults.safety: Maintains a safe work environment and practices safe equipment handling; follows OSHA/VA safety policies; observes ergonomic best practices and safe lifting/cabling to prevent injury and service disruption.

supervisory.customer_service: Sets service expectations and monitors quality; resolves escalations and drives continual service improvement.
supervisory.security: Enforces compliance with cybersecurity and privacy policies; validates privileged access, reviews change activity, and ensures corrective actions.
supervisory.safety: Promotes a safety culture; ensures staff follow VA/OSHA requirements and safe equipment/ergonomic practices.

notes: Use 'defaults' for non-supervisory positions; use 'supervisory' when supervisory_status is true.
